landing.heroSubtitle: Stop second-guessing your lineups. Bench Goblins analyzes player data, matchups, and trends to give you confident start/sit, trade, and waiver recommendations in seconds.
landing.whySubtitle: More than just rankings. Personalized analysis for your specific situation.
landing.featureAIDesc: Get instant recommendations powered by Claude AI with deep understanding of fantasy sports strategy.
landing.featureScoringDesc: Proprietary scoring system analyzing Space Creation, Role Motion, Gravity Impact, Opportunity Delta, and Matchup Fit.
landing.featureRealTimeDesc: Live player data from ESPN, Yahoo, and Sleeper integrated into every decision.
landing.featureMultiSportDesc: NBA, NFL, MLB, NHL, and Soccer coverage with sport-specific scoring and analysis.
landing.riskSubtitle: Tailor recommendations to your matchup situation and risk tolerance.
landing.floorDesc: Prioritize consistent, safe players. Minimize variance and protect your lead.
landing.medianDesc: Balanced approach weighing floor and ceiling equally. Best for most matchups.
landing.ceilingDesc: Chase upside and boom potential. When you need a big week to come back.
landing.askSubtitle: Bench Goblins understands natural language questions about your fantasy team.
landing.exampleQuery: "Should I start Jayson Tatum or Anthony Edwards this week? I'm projected to lose by 10 points."
landing.exampleNote: Bench Goblins will factor in your situation when making recommendations.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of fantasy managers making smarter decisions with Bench Goblins.
landing.footerTagline: Built by fantasy sports enthusiasts, for fantasy sports enthusiasts.

login.subtitle: Your AI-powered fantasy sports advisor
login.signInPrompt: Sign in to save your history and unlock Pro features
login.termsNotice: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
